heading: Procedure
body:
- Click Username and Password.

- Set the new user's Username and
  Password.

  > **Note:** If you use special characters in your password, you must
  > escape them in the connection string that you use to
  > connect to your cluster. To learn more,
  > see [Special characters in connection string password](special-pass-characters).

  You can't change a username after you create the user. You
  can click the Edit button to edit the password.

- Click Create User.
